zh.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Morse於1519年出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，他的父親Robert Morse19歲，母親Agnes Mosse20歲。他於1535年與Agnes Hurland在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德被列為laborer。他去世於1567年2月17日在英國享年48歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Morse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Morris  .
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames, especially   Moses  . Compare   Morris  .
History: Samuel Morse (1791–1872), inventor of the electric telegraph andof Morse code, was a direct descendant of Anthony Morse of Wiltshire,England, who had emigrated to MA in 1635.

variants.name: Morss
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and London): variant of   Morse  .

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Morse was born in 1519, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Morse, was 19 and his mother, Agnes Mosse, was 20. He married Agnes Hurland in 1535, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as laborer in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 17 February 1567, in England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England.

fr.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Morse est né en 1519, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Morse, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes Mosse, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Hurland en 1535, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est laborer à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 17 février 1567, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Morse 1519 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Morse 19 und seine Mutter Agnes Mosse 20. Er hat 1535 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes Hurland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als laborer in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Februar 1567 im Alter von 48 Jahren in England und wurde in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

ja.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランド
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Morseが1519年にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで生まれた時，父Robert Morseは19歳，母Agnes Mosseは20歳であった。1535年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでAgnes Hurlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでの職業はlaborerと記録されている。彼は1567年2月17日にイギリスで48歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Morse(이)가 1519년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Morse(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Mosse(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Agnes Hurland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 laborer이었다. 그는 1567년 2월 17일 영국에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Morse nasceu em 1519, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Morse, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Mosse, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Hurland em 1535, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como laborer em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1567, em Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Morse родился в 1519 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Morse было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mosse, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Hurland в 1535 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии laborer в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 17 февраля 1567 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Agnes Hurland en 1535, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era laborer en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1567, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
